questions.question: Where is India located in the world?
questions.answer: India is located in South Asia and lies entirely in the Northern Hemisphere.

questions.question: State the latitudinal extent of India.
questions.answer: India extends from 8°4'N to 37°6'N latitudes.

questions.question: State the longitudinal extent of India.
questions.answer: India extends from 68°7'E to 97°25'E longitudes.

questions.question: What is the Tropic of Cancer?
questions.answer: The Tropic of Cancer is the latitude 23°30'N that passes almost through the middle of India.

questions.question: How does the Tropic of Cancer divide India?
questions.answer: It divides India into tropical and subtropical regions.

questions.question: What is the total geographical area of India?
questions.answer: The total geographical area of India is about 3.28 million square kilometres.

questions.question: What is India's rank in the world according to area?
questions.answer: India is the seventh largest country in the world.

questions.question: What is the length of India's land boundary?
questions.answer: India's land boundary is about 15,200 kilometres long.

questions.question: What is the total coastline length of India including islands?
questions.answer: The total coastline length is about 7,516.6 kilometres.

questions.question: Which sea lies to the west of India?
questions.answer: The Arabian Sea lies to the west of India.

questions.question: Which sea lies to the east of India?
questions.answer: The Bay of Bengal lies to the east of India.

questions.question: Which ocean lies to the south of India?
questions.answer: The Indian Ocean lies to the south of India.

questions.question: What is the Standard Meridian of India?
questions.answer: The Standard Meridian of India is 82°30'E longitude.

questions.question: Why does India use a standard time?
questions.answer: India uses a standard time to maintain uniform time across the country.

questions.question: Name the place near the Standard Meridian of India.
questions.answer: Mirzapur in Uttar Pradesh lies near the Standard Meridian of India.

questions.question: Why is India's location considered important?
questions.answer: India's location is important because it lies centrally between East and West Asia.

questions.question: How did India's location help in ancient trade?
questions.answer: India's location helped in establishing trade contacts between different parts of the world.

questions.question: Name one idea that spread from India to other parts of the world.
questions.answer: The decimal system spread from India to other parts of the world.

questions.question: Name one product exported from India in ancient times.
questions.answer: Spices were exported from India in ancient times.

questions.question: Name two countries that share land boundaries with India.
questions.answer: Pakistan and Nepal share land boundaries with India.

questions.question: Which countries lie to the east of India?
questions.answer: Bangladesh and Myanmar lie to the east of India.

questions.question: Which island group lies in the Arabian Sea?
questions.answer: Lakshadweep Islands lie in the Arabian Sea.

questions.question: Which island group lies in the Bay of Bengal?
questions.answer: Andaman and Nicobar Islands lie in the Bay of Bengal.

questions.question: Which strait separates India and Sri Lanka?
questions.answer: The Palk Strait separates India and Sri Lanka.

questions.question: Name the two island countries that are India's neighbours.
questions.answer: Sri Lanka and Maldives are India's island neighbours.
